flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Miller-Motte College-Chattanooga fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (42.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miller-Motte College-Chattanooga rose 342% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Miller-Motte College-Chattanooga fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Miller-Motte College-Chattanooga rose 15% between 2022 and 2024 (52.1% → 60.1%).
